description_long: This is an adult female pedestrian with a casual urban appearance. She is wearing a long-sleeved, open-front checkered shirt over a light top, paired with fitted pants and lace-up shoes. Her arms are extended horizontally, and she has long, straight hair that falls past her shoulders. Accessories include a visible earring and bracelets on both wrists, adding to her everyday street style. The figure's facial features are detailed, and her posture is upright and relaxed. The overall look is typical of someone walking or standing in a city or neighborhood environment.
description: A casually dressed adult woman with a checkered shirt, fitted pants, and long straight hair, standing with arms outstretched. She has visible accessories and a relaxed, upright posture.
description_view_0: Front view showing facial features, open checkered shirt, light top, and accessories on both wrists.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the length of the hair, and the layered clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the straight hair, the back of the checkered shirt, and fitted pants.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, arm, and the way the shirt drapes over the body.
attribute_clothing_type: casual open-front shirt over a top, fitted pants, and lace-up shoes with visible accessories
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: long straight hair with a side part
